prompt: Change the world map colors to match autumn foliage
prompt_refined: Edit image 2 (the world map). Apply a color palette to the landmasses of the world map that directly matches the warm, vibrant reds, oranges, yellows, and deep greens/browns observed in the autumn forest in image 1. Ensure the ocean colors in image 2 are adjusted to maintain clear visual separation and contrast with the newly colored land areas, while still representing water.
objects: oceans with colors providing clear visual separation from land
